generated_oml:
// C1: Sensing Infrastructure - Digital Shadow Components
instance ManufacturingDigitalShadow : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Contextual data aggregation system implementing Kritzinger et al. Digital Shadow reference model for manufacturing environments, collecting heterogeneous sensor traces via standardized protocols (OPC UA, MQTT) for passive, one-way data flow to digital representations"
]

instance ManufacturingSensorCluster : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Aggregated sensing infrastructure for industrial manufacturing systems, collecting contextual data traces from multiple IoT/industrial sensors for digital twin abstraction purposes"
]

instance ManufacturingDataAggregator : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Centralized data aggregation component processing raw sensor inputs into contextual data traces for specific manufacturing applications"
]

// C2: Produced Data Types
instance ManufacturingContextData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom ManufacturingDigitalShadow
]

instance ManufacturingProcessTrace : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom ManufacturingSensorCluster
]

instance ManufacturingStateTrace : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom ManufacturingDataAggregator
]

// C3: Data Components
instance ContextualDataTrace : DTDFVocab:Data [
    DTDFVocab:fromData ManufacturingContextData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DigitalShadowProcessingEnabler
]

instance ProcessOperationTrace : DTDFVocab:Data [
    DTDFVocab:fromData ManufacturingProcessTrace
    DTDFVocab:inputTo BehavioralModelingEnabler
]

instance SystemStateTrace : DTDFVocab:Data [
    DTDFVocab:fromData ManufacturingStateTrace
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulationValidationEnabler
]

// C4: Enablers/Tools
instance DigitalShadowProcessingEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Passive data processing framework implementing Kritzinger et al. Digital Shadow reference model for manufacturing context-aware data aggregation and abstraction"
    DTDFVocab:enables DigitalTwinMonitoringService
]

instance BehavioralModelingEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MontiArc Automaton and SysML state machine implementation for behavioral modeling of manufacturing system states and transitions"
    DTDFVocab:enables PredictiveAnalyticsService
]

instance SimulationValidationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MathWorks Simulink integration for simulation-based validation of manufacturing system behaviors and interface compliance"
    DTDFVocab:enables FidelityValidationService
]

instance MBSEMethodologiesEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MBSE frameworks (RFLP, OOSEM, SMArDT) for structured system decomposition across abstraction layers (requirements, functional, logical, technical)"
    DTDFVocab:enables ArchitectureDefinitionService
]

instance ADLImplementationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Architecture Description Languages (ACME, AADL, MontiArc, SysML IBDs) for component modeling, interface specification, and compositional relationships"
    DTDFVocab:enables InterfaceComplianceService
]

// C5: Services
instance DigitalTwinMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Active DT component that processes contextual data traces from digital shadows for real-time manufacturing monitoring and state inference"
    DTDFVocab:provides ManufacturingStateInsight
]

instance PredictiveAnalyticsService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Behavioral modeling service using MontiArc automata and SysML state machines to enable predictive analytics for manufacturing process optimization"
    DTDFVocab:provides ProcessPredictionAction
]

instance FidelityValidationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Simulation-based validation service using MathWorks Simulink to verify DT fidelity through interface compliance and behavioral simulation"
    DTDFVocab:provides ValidationConfidenceInsight
]

instance ArchitectureDefinitionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "MBSE framework service implementing RFLP/SPES methodologies for defining system architecture across multiple abstraction layers"
    DTDFVocab:provides ArchitectureAlignmentAction
]

instance InterfaceComplianceService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "ADL-based interface compliance validation service ensuring component interface consistency across manufacturing system layers"
    DTDFVocab:provides InterfaceValidationAction
]

// C6: Insights/Actions
instance ManufacturingStateInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Inferred manufacturing system states derived from contextual data traces processed through behavioral modeling and simulation validation"
]

instance ProcessPredictionAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Autonomous decision-making action based on predictive analytics derived from behavioral modeling of manufacturing processes"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance ValidationConfidenceInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Confidence measures derived from ADL validation (interface compliance) and simulation fidelity assessments for manufacturing DT components"
]

instance ArchitectureAlignmentAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Model-driven interaction action ensuring alignment across stakeholder perspectives through MBSE methodology implementation"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance InterfaceValidationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automated interface validation action ensuring component interface compliance across manufacturing system layers"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

// C7: Models
instance ManufacturingSystemRequirementsModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Requirements model defining manufacturing system functional and non-functional requirements using MBSE methodologies"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MBSEMethodologiesEnabler
]

instance FunctionalArchitectureModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Functional architecture model defining system functions and their interconnections using SysML IBDs"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ADLImplementationEnabler
]

instance LogicalArchitectureModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Logical architecture model specifying component behaviors and interfaces using MontiArc Automata and SysML state machines"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo BehavioralModelingEnabler
]

instance ProductArchitectureModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Product/technical architecture model defining physical implementation details using AADL and C++/Java code integration"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulationValidationEnabler
]

// C8: Environment
instance ManufacturingEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains ManufacturingDigitalShadow,
        ManufacturingSensorCluster,
        ManufacturingDataAggregator,
        DigitalTwinMonitoringService,
        PredictiveAnalyticsService,
        FidelityValidationService,
        ArchitectureDefinitionService,
        InterfaceComplianceService,
        ManufacturingSystemRequirementsModel,
        FunctionalArchitectureModel,
        LogicalArchitectureModel,
        ProductArchitectureModel
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "
  A Digital Twin (DT) lifecycle in the described context spans structured phases aligned with Model-Based Systems Engineering (MBSE) methodologies, emphasizing **multi-abstraction modeling** across requirements, functional architecture, logical architecture, and product/technical layers. Key stages include:
  - **Requirements Phase**: Defines functional and non-functional specifications using **SysML** or **ADLs** (e.g., AADL, ACME, MontiArc), capturing stakeholder perspectives via **component & connector** modeling.
  - **Functional/Logical Architecture Phase**: Emphasizes **architecture description languages (ADLs)** like **MontiArc Automaton** or **SysML state machines** to describe system behavior and interconnections, often supplemented with **Simulink** or simulation tools for dynamic validation.
  - **Product/Technical Layer**: Integrates **code in general-purpose languages (e.g., C++, Java)** or simulation outputs to finalize DT representation. Transition management relies on **methodologies like RFLP (Requirements, Functions, Logics, Physics)** or **OOSEM**, ensuring seamless abstraction handoffs between layers.
  **Lifecycle governance** is implicit in MBSE frameworks, where **heterogeneous stakeholder integration** (e.g., via **SysML IBDs**) and **tool heterogeneity** (e.g., SysML + Simulink) drive iterative refinement. No explicit lifecycle governance tools (e.g., CMMI for DTs) are mentioned, but the focus on **abstraction layers** and **ADL behavior modeling** underpins evolution governance.
 "
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "
  The described Digital Twin (DT) system adheres to **industry-standard modeling frameworks** for software/system engineering:
  - **Modeling Languages**: **SysML** (for requirements/architecture), **AADL/ACME/MontiArc** (for component/connector modeling), and **ADLs with behavior extensions** (e.g., MontiArc Automaton, SysML state machines).
  - **Simulation Standards**: **MathWorks Simulink** (for dynamic simulation) and **general-purpose languages (C++, Java)** for code-based validation.
  - **Interoperability**: Implicit via **tool integration** (e.g., SysML + Simulink) and **ABSE (Architecture Description Languages) standards** (e.g., AADL, MontiArc). **No explicit certification frameworks** (e.g., ISO/IEC 25010) or compliance audits are referenced.
  - **Digital Shadow Standards**: **Kritzinger et al. [32]** defines digital shadows as **one-way, passive data flows** with **aggregation/abstraction** for specific purposes, but no formal standards (e.g., IEEE 2030.1) are cited.
  **Not in Document"
]
